info.title: kora-rpc
info.description: RPC server for Kora gasless relayer

id.description: An ID to identify the request.

jsonrpc.description: The version of the JSON-RPC protocol.

method.description: The name of the method to invoke.

sig_verify.description: Whether to verify signatures during simulation (defaults to false)

sign_only_indices.description: Optional indices of transactions to estimate fees for (defaults to all if not specified)

signer_key.description: Optional signer signer_key to ensure consistency across related RPC calls

payment_address.description: Public key of the payment destination

signer_pubkey.description: Public key of the signer used for fee estimation (for client consistency)

id.description: An ID to identify the request.

jsonrpc.description: The version of the JSON-RPC protocol.

method.description: The name of the method to invoke.

params.description:
Request payload for estimating the fee of a transaction.

This endpoint calculates the required fee for a given transaction based on current
oracle prices and Kora's configuration. It can estimate fees in native SOL (lamports)
and in a specific supported SPL token if `fee_token` is provided.

fee_token.description: Optional mint address of the SPL token to calculate the fee in. If omitted, returns only the lamport fee.

sig_verify.description: Whether to verify signatures during simulation (defaults to false)

signer_key.description: Optional public key of the signer to ensure consistency

schema.description: Response payload containing the estimated transaction fee.

fee_in_lamports.description: The exact fee required in native SOL (lamports)

fee_in_token.description: The estimated fee in the requested SPL token (if `fee_token` was provided in the request)

payment_address.description: Public key of the payment destination where the fee should be sent

signer_pubkey.description: Public key of the signer used for fee estimation (for client consistency)

params.description:
Request payload for signing a transaction.

This endpoint accepts a base64-encoded Solana transaction, validates it against
the configured fee payer policies, and if successful, signs it using Kora's
configured signer policy
but not broadcasted to the network.

sig_verify.description: Whether to verify signatures during simulation (defaults to false)

signer_key.description: Optional public key of the signer to ensure consistency

user_id.description: Optional user ID for usage tracking (required when pricing is Free and usage tracking is enabled)

schema.description: Response payload containing the signed transaction.

signed_transaction.description: Base64-encoded transaction signed by the Kora fee payer

signer_pubkey.description: Public key of the signer used (for client consistency)

id.description: An ID to identify the request.

jsonrpc.description: The version of the JSON-RPC protocol.

method.description: The name of the method to invoke.

params.description:
**DEPRECATED**: Use `getPaymentInstruction` instead for fee payment flows.
This endpoint will be removed in a future version.

Request payload for creating a simple token or SOL transfer transaction.
This endpoint constructs an unsigned transfer where Kora acts as the fee payer,
but the user must still sign the transaction before it can be submitted.

amount.description: Amount to transfer (in the token's smallest unit, e.g. lamports for SOL)

destination.description: The destination wallet address that will receive the tokens

signer_key.description: Optional public key of the signer to ensure consistency

source.description: The source wallet address that will send the tokens

token.description: Token mint address to transfer (use native SOL address for SOL transfers)

schema.description:
**DEPRECATED**: Use `getPaymentInstruction` instead for fee payment flows.

Response payload containing the constructed transfer transaction.

blockhash.description: The blockhash used when constructing the transaction

signer_pubkey.description: Public key of the Kora signer used as the fee payer (for client consistency)

transaction.description: Unsigned base64-encoded transaction ready for the user to sign

allow_close.description: Allow fee payer to be authority in ALT CloseLookupTable instructions

allow_create.description: Allow fee payer to be authority/payer in ALT CreateLookupTable instructions

allow_deactivate.description: Allow fee payer to be authority in ALT DeactivateLookupTable instructions

allow_extend.description: Allow fee payer to be authority/payer in ALT ExtendLookupTable instructions

allow_freeze.description: Allow fee payer to be authority in ALT FreezeLookupTable instructions

payment_address.description: The payment destination owner address (same as signer if no separate paymaster is configured)

allow_copy.description: Allow fee payer to be the authority in Copy instructions

allow_deploy.description: Allow fee payer to be the authority in Deploy instructions

allow_finalize.description: Allow fee payer to be the current authority in Finalize instructions

allow_retract.description: Allow fee payer to be the authority in Retract instructions

allow_set_program_length.description: Allow fee payer to be the authority in SetProgramLength instructions

allow_transfer_authority.description: Allow fee payer to be the current authority in TransferAuthority instructions

allow_write.description: Allow fee payer to be the authority in Write instructions

allow_advance.description: Allow fee payer to be the nonce authority in AdvanceNonceAccount instructions

allow_authorize.description: Allow fee payer to be the current nonce authority in AuthorizeNonceAccount instructions

allow_initialize.description: Allow fee payer to be set as the nonce authority in InitializeNonceAccount instructions

allow_withdraw.description: Allow fee payer to be the nonce authority in WithdrawNonceAccount instructions

sig_verify.description: Whether to verify signatures during simulation (defaults to false)

signer_key.description: Optional signer signer_key to ensure consistency across related RPC calls

user_id.description: Optional user ID for usage tracking (required when pricing is free and usage tracking is enabled)

signer_pubkey.description: Public key of the signer used (for client consistency)

SignTransactionRequest.description:
Request payload for signing a transaction.

This endpoint accepts a base64-encoded Solana transaction, validates it against
the configured fee payer policies, and if successful, signs it using Kora's
configured signer policy
but not broadcasted to the network.

sig_verify.description: Whether to verify signatures during simulation (defaults to false)

signer_key.description: Optional public key of the signer to ensure consistency

user_id.description: Optional user ID for usage tracking (required when pricing is Free and usage tracking is enabled)

SignTransactionResponse.description: Response payload containing the signed transaction.

signed_transaction.description: Base64-encoded transaction signed by the Kora fee payer

signer_pubkey.description: Public key of the signer used (for client consistency)

allow_approve.description: Allow fee payer to be the owner in SPL Token Approve/ApproveChecked instructions

allow_burn.description: Allow fee payer to be the owner in SPL Token Burn/BurnChecked instructions

allow_close_account.description: Allow fee payer to be the owner in SPL Token CloseAccount instructions

allow_freeze_account.description: Allow fee payer to be the freeze authority in SPL Token FreezeAccount instructions

allow_initialize_account.description: Allow fee payer to be set as the owner in SPL Token InitializeAccount instructions

allow_initialize_mint.description: Allow fee payer to be the mint authority in SPL Token InitializeMint/InitializeMint2 instructions

allow_initialize_multisig.description: Allow fee payer to be a signer in SPL Token InitializeMultisig instructions

allow_mint_to.description: Allow fee payer to be the mint authority in SPL Token MintTo/MintToChecked instructions

allow_revoke.description: Allow fee payer to be the owner in SPL Token Revoke instructions

allow_set_authority.description: Allow fee payer to be the current authority in SPL Token SetAuthority instructions

allow_thaw_account.description: Allow fee payer to be the freeze authority in SPL Token ThawAccount instructions

allow_transfer.description: Allow fee payer to be the owner in SPL Token Transfer/TransferChecked instructions

allow_allocate.description: Allow fee payer to be the account in System Allocate/AllocateWithSeed instructions

allow_assign.description: Allow fee payer to be the authority in System Assign/AssignWithSeed instructions

allow_create_account.description: Allow fee payer to be the payer in System CreateAccount/CreateAccountWithSeed instructions

allow_transfer.description: Allow fee payer to be the sender in System Transfer/TransferWithSeed instructions

allow_approve.description: Allow fee payer to be the owner in Token2022 Approve/ApproveChecked instructions

allow_burn.description: Allow fee payer to be the owner in Token2022 Burn/BurnChecked instructions

allow_close_account.description: Allow fee payer to be the owner in Token2022 CloseAccount instructions

allow_freeze_account.description: Allow fee payer to be the freeze authority in Token2022 FreezeAccount instructions

allow_initialize_account.description: Allow fee payer to be set as the owner in Token2022 InitializeAccount instructions

allow_initialize_extension_authority.description:
Allow fee payer to be planted as a future Token2022 extension authority/delegate during
extension initialization.

allow_initialize_mint.description: Allow fee payer to be the mint authority in Token2022 InitializeMint/InitializeMint2 instructions

allow_initialize_multisig.description: Allow fee payer to be a signer in Token2022 InitializeMultisig instructions

allow_mint_to.description: Allow fee payer to be the mint authority in Token2022 MintTo/MintToChecked instructions

allow_revoke.description: Allow fee payer to be the owner in Token2022 Revoke instructions

allow_set_authority.description: Allow fee payer to be the current authority in Token2022 SetAuthority instructions

allow_thaw_account.description: Allow fee payer to be the freeze authority in Token2022 ThawAccount instructions

allow_transfer.description: Allow fee payer to be the owner in Token2022 Transfer/TransferChecked instructions

allow_update_extension_authority.description:
Allow fee payer to be used as the current authority for Token2022 extension update/admin
instructions.

TransferTransactionRequest.description:
**DEPRECATED**: Use `getPaymentInstruction` instead for fee payment flows.
This endpoint will be removed in a future version.

Request payload for creating a simple token or SOL transfer transaction.
This endpoint constructs an unsigned transfer where Kora acts as the fee payer,
but the user must still sign the transaction before it can be submitted.

amount.description: Amount to transfer (in the token's smallest unit, e.g. lamports for SOL)

destination.description: The destination wallet address that will receive the tokens

signer_key.description: Optional public key of the signer to ensure consistency

source.description: The source wallet address that will send the tokens

token.description: Token mint address to transfer (use native SOL address for SOL transfers)

TransferTransactionResponse.description:
**DEPRECATED**: Use `getPaymentInstruction` instead for fee payment flows.

Response payload containing the constructed transfer transaction.

blockhash.description: The blockhash used when constructing the transaction

signer_pubkey.description: Public key of the Kora signer used as the fee payer (for client consistency)

transaction.description: Unsigned base64-encoded transaction ready for the user to sign

allow_durable_transactions.description:
Allow durable transactions (nonce-based). Default: false.
When false, rejects any transaction containing AdvanceNonceAccount instruction.
WARNING: Enabling with dynamic pricing creates price arbitrage risk.

max_price_staleness_slots.description:
Maximum allowed age of oracle price data in slots. 0 = disabled (default).
When >0, prices with a block_id older than `current_slot - max_price_staleness_slots` are rejected.

require_one_of_programs.description:
Programs where at least one must be called by the transaction (OR semantics).
Each required program must also be listed in `allowed_programs`.
Default: empty (no restriction).
